title: corallocarpus emetocatharticus
intro: Corallocarpus emetocatharticus, also known as the vomiting cucumber, is a plant species belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce vomiting and relieve symptoms associated with indigestion, nausea, and diarrhea. The health benefits of Corallocarpus emetocatharticus include its potential to treat various gastrointestinal disorders, as well as its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, with some traditional remedies involving the use of the plant's roots or leaves.
